title: GAO-15-19 (Full Report): SSA Disability Benefits — Physician-Assisted Fraud (2014)
description: Full text of GAO report GAO-15-19 (46-page PDF, November 2014), 'SSA Disability Benefits: Enhanced Policies and Management Focus Needed to Address Potential Physician-Assisted Fraud', a report to congressional requesters. Provides the complete findings on SSA/DDS fraud-detection vulnerabilities (staff detection challenges, processing-time disincentives, limited anti-fraud training, sanctioned-physician evidence risk, under-planned analytics initiatives), scope and methodology (visited 5 of 54 DDS offices; analyzed DDS data on federally sanctioned physicians), the full set of five recommendations, and SSA's responses. Companion full-text representation of the gao-15-19 base record.

source.title: SSA Disability Benefits: Enhanced Policies and Management Focus Needed to Address Potential Physician-Assisted Fraud (GAO-15-19, Full Report)

notes: Authoritative: extracted full text of the published 46-page GAO-15-19 PDF.
